title: Philadelphia Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Philadelphia with a Z-Score of +5.06. This event has reached a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Philadelphia is causing significant disruptions to daily life. Temperatures are extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 16.7 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
 The relative humidity is at 38%, and wind speed is at 16.7 km/h, which may provide some relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the extreme heat, with no cold temperatures to provide relief.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
agri_impact: Crops at risk of heat damage
